title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 6-C.  LOUISIANA REPOSITORY FOR UNIDENTIFIED

AND MISSING PERSONS INFORMATION PROGRAM

§651.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known as the "Louisiana Repository for Unidentified and Missing Persons Information Program".

Acts 2006, No. 227, §1.
